meaning: n.驱动桥(与变速箱连成一体,用于前轮驱动的汽车)
examples: Check the manual transaxle fluid level.
Fly - drive transaxle wheel drive system.
Front axles are connected directly to the transaxle and provide power to the front wheels.
The 6.3-liter, naturally aspirated V12 directs more than 500 pound-feet of torque through the seven-speed, dual-clutch rear transaxle.
